title: Eye Exercise
subtitle: Evidence-based oculomotor training
discardConfirm: Are you sure you want to discard this training session?

horizontal_saccades.name: Horizontal Saccades
horizontal_saccades.desc: Keep head still, quickly shift gaze between two targets placed horizontally
horizontal_saccades.tip: Keep head completely still, move only eyes — aim for speed and accuracy

vertical_saccades.name: Vertical Saccades
vertical_saccades.desc: Keep head still, quickly shift gaze between two targets placed vertically
vertical_saccades.tip: Briefly fixate on each target to confirm clear vision

diagonal_saccades.name: Diagonal Saccades
diagonal_saccades.desc: Keep head still, quickly shift gaze along diagonal directions
diagonal_saccades.tip: Practice both diagonals: upper-left to lower-right, then upper-right to lower-left

smooth_pursuit_circle.name: Circle Pursuit
smooth_pursuit_circle.desc: Hold a pen at arm's length, slowly trace a circle — follow smoothly with eyes
smooth_pursuit_circle.tip: Keep head still, tracking should be smooth not jerky. Do both clockwise and counter-clockwise

smooth_pursuit_figure8.name: Figure-8 Pursuit
smooth_pursuit_figure8.desc: Hold a pen at arm's length, slowly trace a horizontal figure-8 (∞) — follow smoothly
smooth_pursuit_figure8.tip: Go as slowly as possible, focus on smooth tracking

near_far_focus.name: Near-Far Focus
near_far_focus.desc: Alternate focus between a near target (40cm text) and a far target (6 meters away)
near_far_focus.tip: Wait until each target is fully clear before switching — trains ciliary muscle flexibility

focus_shift.name: Focus Shift
focus_shift.desc: Place thumb at 30cm, other hand at 60cm, rapidly alternate focus between them
focus_shift.tip: Gradually increase speed while maintaining clarity

pencil_pushup.name: Pencil Push-Up
pencil_pushup.desc: Hold pencil at arm's length, focus on tip, slowly bring toward nose until image doubles
pencil_pushup.tip: Track where the image starts to blur — goal is to maintain single vision within 6cm

convergence_hold.name: Convergence Hold
convergence_hold.desc: Place target 10-15cm from nose, maintain single clear image
convergence_hold.tip: If image doubles, move target slightly farther and gradually work closer

palming.name: Palming
palming.desc: Rub palms together to warm them, gently cup over closed eyes and relax
palming.tip: Don't press on eyeballs — feel the warmth and darkness relax your eyes

slow_blink.name: Slow Blink
slow_blink.desc: Slowly and fully close your eyes, then open — spread tear film evenly
slow_blink.tip: Hold eyes closed for 1-2 seconds each time — helps with screen-induced dry eye

twenty_twenty.name: 20-20-20 Rule
twenty_twenty.desc: Look at something 6 meters (20 feet) away for 20 seconds
twenty_twenty.tip: Do this every 20 minutes of screen time — the simplest effective eye care habit

restDesc: Relax your eyes, prepare for the next exercise
notePlaceholder: Record how you feel about this training...
scienceDesc: Oculomotor exercises based on CITT clinical trials and IMI white papers — reduces digital eye strain and convergence insufficiency
recommendFreq: Recommended: twice daily, morning and evening
